calendar.matters:
Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for (trustee) Jeanne Rosenmeier.

Ms. Hinshaw stated that "it is the right thing to do", that they are trying to fix an error, that they have consent from all of the beneficiaries and that they could modify the trust. The Court stated that the payment should come directly from the trust. The petition for instructions was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
